svg.title: UART loopback signal timing for data 8'hA5
svg.desc: Timing diagram using the real RTL signal names, with a low start bit, LSB-first data, a high stop bit, 16-times receiver enable pulses, and receive-ready handshaking.
svg.text: Actual top-level/internal names from uart_top.v · UART sends 1010_0101 as d0…d7 = 1,0,1,0,0,1,0,1
Current RTL detail: busy = (state != IDLE), so busy can fall when the stop bit begins; tx_line still remains high for the full stop-bit interval.
